name: acquisition refuses an unresolved technology rather than fabricating rules (cite-or-decline)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-rules.sh" --technology Cobol --project P556Q03 --source-file g.txt --source-id sid 2>e.err; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'status=unresolved' e.err && echo acquire-declines-unknown 1>&2
setup: printf '%s\n' 'Always bind a unique key to every loop element.' 'Never combine conditional and loop on one element.' > g.txt
